# Adapted Solutions
# https://adaptedsolutionsco.com

## About
Adapted Solutions helps small businesses and trade professionals in two ways:
(1) modernizing their operations with custom AI systems and applications, and
(2) growing their digital visibility so AI engines recommend their business.

## Pillar 1 — Operations & AI Modernization
Target: HVAC contractors, plumbers, electricians, and field service businesses.
Services: Custom applications, AI system integration, workflow automation, business consulting.
Flagship product: Adapted Pro Tech — a comprehensive field service management platform for trades businesses. https://adaptedprotech.com

## Pillar 2 — Adapted Solutions Digital (Digital Visibility)
Target: Any small business that wants to be recommended by AI assistants.
Key fact: Customers are 8x more likely to use a business recommended by AI.
Services:
- Free 16-point AEO/GEO audit (instant, no signup): https://adaptedsolutionsco.com/#audit-tool
- One-time AEO/GEO implementation ($300-$800)
- Quarterly visibility retainer (blog automation, content seeding, re-audits)
- Full site reimagination (AI-enabled CMS, content automation, digital footprint management)

## Contact
Website: https://adaptedsolutionsco.com
Email: info@adaptedsolutionsco.com
